_meta.description: Asset attributes for named drug / vaccine programs, keyed by name.
_meta.READ_THIS_FIRST: THESE ARE DECLARED INPUTS, NOT SOURCE DATA. BIO/QLS (2021) and Wong (2019) are aggregate statistics: neither contains a single per-drug row, so a program's phase / disease area / modality / flags CANNOT be derived from them. Every entry below is a human assertion about a real-world program. The engine's statistics still trace to published figures, but a per-drug estimate is only ever as good as the entry it started from -- a wrong current_phase changes the answer more than any modelling choice in the engine.

entry_fields.current_phase: REQUIRED. phase1 | phase2 | phase3 | filing -- where the program is NOW.
entry_fields.disease_area: Optional. One of the 15 canonical DiseaseArea values (see data/taxonomy.json).
entry_fields.modality: Optional. One of the 10 BIO/QLS Figure 10b modalities (see src/pos_engine/asset.py).
entry_fields.prior_approval_flag: Optional bool. Already approved for another indication.
entry_fields.breakthrough_flag: Optional bool. FDA Breakthrough Therapy designation.
entry_fields.trial_outcome: Optional. positive | negative | unknown -- the latest pivotal read-out.
entry_fields.lead_indication_flag: Optional bool. This is the drug's lead indication.
entry_fields._source: REQUIRED. Where these attributes came from (registry, filing, press release, label...).
entry_fields._as_of: REQUIRED. ISO date the attributes were last checked. Phases go stale.

_meta.how_to_add: Add a key under 'assets' with the fields above. Names match case-insensitively. Do not guess a phase: an unverified current_phase produces a confidently wrong number. If you don't have the attributes, pass them explicitly on the command line instead of committing a guess.
_meta.why_this_is_not_prefilled: No real programs are seeded here because their attributes are not in this repo's sources and inventing them would fabricate the one input the whole estimate pivots on. EXAMPLE-001 is fictional and exists only to exercise the pipeline.

EXAMPLE-001._source: FICTIONAL demo entry -- not a real program. Exists to exercise the pipeline.
